name: add_watermark
description: Overlay a watermark image on top of a base image. Control the position, scale, opacity, and blending mode. The watermark image must also be hosted on your imgix source.

parameters.name: mark
parameters.description: URL or path of the watermark image.

parameters.name: mark-align
parameters.description: Watermark alignment: top, middle, bottom, left, center, right. Combine with comma.

parameters.name: mark-scale
parameters.description: Scale watermark as percentage of base image (1-100).

body.note: Returns the image with watermark overlay applied. The watermark appears at 50% opacity in the bottom-right corner.
